description_long: This object consists of a round wooden tray supporting a square ceramic plate, on which a large wrap sandwich filled with colorful vegetables and meat is placed. Next to the wrap, there are garnishes including a slice of tomato, a sprig of parsley, a wedge of lime, and a lettuce leaf. A small pool of dark sauce is artfully arranged on the plate, adding visual interest. A plastic bottle filled with a red beverage, capped with a blue lid, stands beside the plate. The food is attractively presented, with the wrap partially open to reveal its fresh ingredients. The overall setup suggests a ready-to-serve meal typical of a street food vendor.
description: A wooden tray holds a ceramic plate with a stuffed wrap, garnishes, and a red drink in a plastic bottle. The food is attractively arranged and ready to serve.
description_view_0: The wrap is mostly closed, with the bottle behind it and garnishes clearly visible on the plate.
description_view_1: The open end of the wrap faces forward, revealing colorful fillings, with the bottle to the right and garnishes in front.
description_view_2: The bottle is in the foreground, partially obscuring the plate, with the wrap seen from the side.
description_view_3: The back of the wrap is visible, with the bottle to the left and garnishes and sauce on the plate.
attribute_food_display: Food is openly displayed on a ceramic plate atop a wooden tray, with garnishes and a drink bottle arranged for easy viewing and access.
